## Question
Ask your question clearly and concisely.

## Context
Provide context to help us understand your question:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What have you tried so far?
- What documentation have you consulted?

```java
// Your current implementation
```

## Configuration (if applicable)
```java
// Your executor configuration
```

## What You've Tried

- [ ] Read the documentation (README.md)
- [ ] Read the HLD (THROTTLE_SERVICE_HLD.md)

## Additional Information
Any other information that might help us answer your question.
